description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular shell with a dark, matte finish and a pronounced brow ridge above the eye openings. The front faceplate is textured with a rugged, almost carved pattern, and has two large, rectangular eye holes for visibility. The sides and rear of the helmet are reinforced with riveted metal plates, adding both structural integrity and a distinctive industrial look. The lower edge and interior lining appear to be made of a softer, brown material, likely for comfort and fit. Two sturdy side straps are visible, suggesting a secure fastening system. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible graphics or branding, and is suitable for protective use in urban environments.
description: A rugged, dark helmet with a textured faceplate, riveted metal reinforcement, and brown comfort lining. Features large eye openings and sturdy side straps for secure fastening.
description_view_0: Front view shows the textured faceplate with two large eye openings and a pronounced brow ridge.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the riveted metal reinforcement, brown lining, and one of the sturdy side straps.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the smooth, dark shell, riveted metal band, and brown lower edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other side strap, metal reinforcement, and the helmet's overall angular shape.
